risk: high: fingerprint IRQ, input, regulator, GPIO, DRM notifier and Netlink paths can affect boot stability and biometric input
rollback: No device operation is authorized in this cycle. A future session must capture the stock module and hashes, stop userspace consumers, unload or unbind in dependency order, load the candidate, collect logs, then restore the stock module on any deviation.
stop_conditions: module reference count is nonzero before unload
KASAN, KCSAN, CFI, BUG, Oops or panic
fingerprint input, regulator, IRQ or DRM notifier regression
stock rollback cannot be proven before the first mutation
